_comment: Resolver roles for middle_layer.py (LM Studio gateway) using LM Studio's SHORT model ids — the form returned by /v1/models on this box (e.g. 'qwen3.5-122b-a10b', 'nousresearch/hermes-4-70b'). Substring-matched in order against the LM Studio inventory; first match wins. The currently-resident model is listed FIRST in every role so swarmCouncil / fanout pick it instead of JIT-loading a giant alternative and OOMing. nousresearch/hermes-4-70b is intentionally last in 'reasoner' so it never becomes the auto-pick when 122B is already loaded. Auto-generated 2026-05-15 from `curl /v1/models` against http://127.0.0.1:1234. Re-tune to match your loaded set when you change pinned models.
